'''Solaest''' was the site of the [[Solaest Uprising]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which was suppressed by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], aboard her cruiser the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']], secretly aided those fleeing the Empire.
